title: Firewall Execution Receipt
description: Versioned, immutable receipt emitted by the firewall executor for every recommendation artifact it processes. Governed by ADR-E01. Canonical owner: firewall.

schema_version.description: Schema version; must match the version field of this document.

receipt_id.description: UUID v4. Primary key for this receipt. Immutable once set.

recommendation_id.description: UUID v4. Echoes the recommendation_id from the processed artifact. Links receipt to recommendation for audit trail.

case_id.description: UUID v4. Echoes the case_id from the processed artifact. Links receipt to the investigation case.

failure_taxonomy.description: Mutually exclusive disposition of the processed artifact. Exactly one value per receipt. See ADR-E01 for definitions.

received_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the firewall executor received the artifact. Uses the firewall's own system clock, not the dispatch system's clock.

processed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the firewall executor completed processing (rule applied, rejected, or rolled back). Uses the firewall's own system clock.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation of the outcome. Required when failure_taxonomy is not 'applied'. For 'applied', may be empty string. For 'rolled_back', MUST document: (1) which post-apply validation check failed, (2) expected vs. observed state, (3) whether rollback succeeded.

firewall_rule_id.description: Identifier of the firewall rule that was created or matched. Populated when failure_taxonomy is 'applied' (the new rule ID) or 'noop_already_present' (the existing rule ID). Null or absent for all other taxonomy values.
